key_points.text: Revenue grew 65% year-over-year to $215,938 million in fiscal 2026, driven by major platform shifts toward accelerated computing and AI, with Data Center computing growing 59% and Data Center networking growing 142%.

citation.quote: Total $ 215,938 | $ 130,497 | $ 85,441 | 65 % | Revenue from Data Center computing grew 59% driven by demand for our Blackwell computing platform. Revenue from Data Center networking grew 142%

key_points.text: Net income increased 65% to $120,067 million in fiscal 2026 from $72,880 million in fiscal 2025, with net income margins remaining strong at 55.6% of revenue.

Operating income more than doubled in the Compute Networking segment to $130,141 million in fiscal 2026 from $82,875 million in fiscal 2025, a 57% increase despite a $4.5 billion charge for H20 excess inventory and purchase obligations.

citation.quote: Operating Income by Reportable Segments | Compute Networking $ 130,141 | $ 82,875 | $ 47,266 | 57 % | driven by growth in revenue, partially offset by a $4.5 billion charge associated with H20 excess inventory

key_points.text: NVIDIA powers over 78% of supercomputers on the global TOP500 list, including 9 of the top 10 systems on the Green500 list, demonstrating dominant market position in high-performance computing infrastructure.

citation.quote: NVIDIA powers over 78% of the supercomputers on the global TOP500 list, including 9 of the top 10 systems on the Green500 list

key_points.text: Strong cash generation with operating cash flow of $102,718 million in fiscal 2026 compared to $64,089 million in fiscal 2025, providing financial flexibility for continued investment and shareholder returns.

citation.quote: Net cash provided by operating activities 102,718 | 64,089 | 28,090

key_points.text: Risk factor: Revenue concentration with one direct customer representing 22% of total revenue in fiscal 2026, presenting potential downside if major customer reduces orders.

citation.quote: For fiscal year 2026, sales to one direct customer represented 22% of total

key_points.text: Management acknowledges execution risks: 'The complexity of our product transitions and sophisticated system configurations has and may in the future cause delays in production and create challenges in managing supply and demand,' which could impact revenue timing.

citation.quote: The complexity of our product transitions and sophisticated system configurations has and may in the future cause delays in production and create challenges in managing supply and demand
